post.summary: Authentication endpoint
post.description: Single endpoint for all auth flows. The `action` field selects the flow.

200.description: OK — returns JSON with token, 2FA challenge, or a message

400.description: Bad Request — validation failed / missing fields

429.description: Too Many Requests — throttled (e.g., resend or attempts)

post.summary: Retrieve accounts report
post.description: Returns filtered accounts data in DataTables format.

post.summary: Admin dashboard actions
post.description: Use `action` to select one of: stats, latestProfiles, latestTransactions

200.description: Successful response corresponding to the requested action

post.summary: Perform admin‐level data operations
post.description: Use the `action` field to select one of many detailed admin operations.

200.description: Success — returns JSON payload for the chosen action

400.description: Bad Request — missing or invalid parameters

post.summary: Perform document-related admin actions
Perform lead queries and assignments
post.description: Use the `action` field to select operations: selecting leads, reports, or assigning them.

post.summary: Perform marketing actions (list, create, toggle, update, stats)
Perform profile operations
post.description: Action is required. Allowed values: select, getProfile, previewDocument, downloadDocument, update, uploadDocument, approveDocument, rejectDocument, deleteDocument, searchIBs, add

post.summary: Perform admin settings actions
post.description: Actions: searchUsers, searchIBs, relationUpdate, list, details, reopen

400.description: Bad Request — missing or invalid parameters

post.summary: Perform admin transaction actions
post.description: Actions: select, selectWithdrawals, selectInternalTransfers, selectCreditCards, getDepositDetails, processDeposit, getWithdrawalDetails, processWithdrawal, getTransferDetails, completeTransfer, getCardDetails, modifyPurseStatus

400.description: Bad Request — missing or invalid parameters

post.summary: Manage configuration Types
post.description:
Supported actions:
     *     - **select**: list/paginate/filter Types  
     *     - **selectOne**: fetch one by `id`  
     *     - **getReportServers**: list all report servers  
     *     - **getServersByType**: list servers for a given `typeId`  
     *     - **add**: create new Type  
     *     - **edit**: update existing Type  
     *     - **delete**: remove a Type

post.summary: Fetch report header options or run a custom report
post.description:
*     **get-header-report**: returns available filter values for the given `columns` array  
     *     **custom-report**: returns DataTables-style report data for given `columns`, `category` and `col_type`

200.description: Header options or report data returned

post.summary: Get secure Analyst URL for a given user
Perform sales-leads operations (list, get, assign, etc.)
Retrieve MT5 account listings (paged or live online)

200.description: Successful response with rows and total

post.summary: Record IB partnership visit and campaign click, then optionally redirect
Send activation code or activate account
List CRM demo accounts
post.description: Returns paged demo accounts for display in a DataGrid

post.summary: Generate a filtered sales report
post.description: Returns totals, leads counts and deposit breakdown for the logged-in sales user between two dates.

post.summary: Retrieve Trading Central access status for a given user
post.description: Returns whether the user is verified, has deposited, and their Trading Central access flag.

200.description: User Trading Central status retrieved successfully

post.summary: Retrieve the latest user deposit and withdrawal transactions
Retrieve various details for a trading account
post.description: Depending on the `action` field, returns account metadata, transactions, open or historical trades, or performs password/demo-fund operations.

post.summary: Fetch templates, existing accounts, options or create a new account for a user

200.description: Successful response – shape varies by action

post.summary: Resend activation code or activate a user profile
Retrieve deposit options or initiate a deposit via Neteller, Skrill, or bank wire

get.summary: Get notification count, list or close all notifications for a user

post.summary: Submit a phone‐callback request
Retrieve or add partner links for a user
Retrieve referred users or their accounts for a partner
Retrieve the full user profile
Get or generate your Refer-a-Friend link and stats
List accounts or move funds internally between them
Fetch user wallets or last transactions
Retrieve withdrawal metadata or submit a withdrawal request
Return the list of available withdrawal methods for the user

oneOf.description: Stats payload (metrics object; keys vary by implementation)

challengeToken.description: Signed, stateless challenge token to be refreshed

oneOf.description: Successful login/register/verify result with token and user payload

message.example: The password has been changed successfully.

action.description: Which admin leads operation to perform

users_id.description: List of user IDs to assign/unassign

sales_id.description: Sales user ID to assign to (or omit to unassign)

columns.description: List of column keys to include

user_id.description: Admin user ID for ACL checks

action.description: mtaccounts = paged legacy list; list_mt5 = live server snapshot

user_id.description: Optional admin user ID for logging

email.description: Email to send activation code to

deposited.description: Whether the user has made a deposit

limit.description: Maximum number of records to return

action.description: One of: getDetails, getTransactions, getOpenTrades, getHistoryTrades, setPassword, fundDemoAccount

user_id.description: Required when action is setPassword or fundDemoAccount

amount.description: Amount to fund demo account (for fundDemoAccount)

user_id.description: The ID of the user to operate on

action.description: send_code → resend the activation code; activate → verify & activate the profile

client_bank.description: Custom bank details: name, IBAN, etc.

action.description: `stats` to read current link & counts, `generate` to create it then read
`getAccounts` to fetch available wallets/accounts, `moveFunds` to do an internal transfer

bearerAuth.description: Paste the JWT you get from /api/auth (login/register). Swagger UI will send it as: Authorization: Bearer {token}

tags.description: Retrieve or modify detailed user/account/transaction data

tags.description: Admin endpoints for querying and managing client leads and reports

tags.description: List and query MT5 trading accounts

tags.name: Admin Marketing
tags.description: Create and manage campaigns, toggle status, and fetch marketing statistics

tags.description: Endpoints for searching users/IBs, updating client-IB relations, and managing queued tasks

tags.name: Custom Report
